title: Help Desk Technician
description: Akamai is hiring a Help Desk Technician to support our employees and customers remotely. You'll troubleshoot technical issues, manage tickets, and provide excellent customer support. This fully remote role offers flexibility while supporting a global technology organization.
responsibilities: Respond to help desk tickets via email, chat, and phone; resolve technical issues efficiently
Troubleshoot hardware, software, and network problems; escalate complex issues appropriately
Provide remote support and remote access to assist users; maintain documentation of solutions
Install software and updates; manage employee hardware provisioning and deprovisioning
Track tickets and metrics; contribute to team knowledge base and documentation

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; CompTIA A+ or equivalent knowledge
